title: Twin Suns Three
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Twin Suns Three''' was a [[Callsign/Legends|callsign]] for the third [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Twin Suns Squadron]]. [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] was the first to use it, followed quickly by [[Zindra Daine]] and then [[Jagged Fel]].<ref name="Rebel Dream">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]''</ref> The position was later taken on by an unnamed man, then an anonymous woman after the unit's reorganization, and then another man.<ref name="Destiny's Way">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref><ref name="Remnant">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''</ref><ref name="The Final Prophecy">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''</ref> Fel later used his brief affiliation with the callsign to create the alias [[Jagged Fel|Twinsins Thlee]].<ref name="Exile">''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{Mo}}
